title: Product Manager - 1 Year Contract (Audio-visual products)
description:
• Effectively manage the entire product lifecycle, from introduction to end-of-life (EOL).
  • Anticipate challenges to product lines and proactively develop strategies to mitigate them.
  • Champion and drive business opportunities for the product group, particularly for new business areas.
  • Plan all marketing and product-related activities with a focus on achieving strong ROIs.
  • Support the development of the annual marketing plan, including advertising, promotions, activities, and sales kits, in collaboration with the local marketing team.
  • Equip the sales team with the necessary product knowledge to enable effective selling of Epson products.
  • Act as the first point of contact for all product-related enquiries and coordinate with internal teams to resolve issues.
  • Develop and implement channel marketing programs to achieve sales goals.
  • Foster strong working relationships with channel partners to drive revenue growth.
  • Communicate clearly and support partners in the execution of channel marketing initiatives.
  • Participate in joint visits with sales colleagues and potential partners when required.
  • Create programs aimed at improving sell-in, sell-out, and sell-through performance.
  • Develop strategic product marketing plans through market research, competitive analysis, pricing, customer engagement, and business planning.
  • Ensure timely submission of ISM and creation of Form C for special price support.
  • Create and distribute price lists and memos for internal and external stakeholders.
  • Prepare program cost sheets to support channel-related activities, including coordination with the Legal team where necessary.
  • Prepare product forecasts and monitor inventory levels continuously. Coordinate with relevant departments to ensure stock availability and meet supply timelines.
  • Participate in and prepare materials for key internal and external meetings.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. All applications will be handled confidentially. By submitting your application, you agree to the collection, use, retention, and disclosure of your personal information to prospective employers.


Wecruit Pte Ltd

EA License No: 20C0270

postedCompany.description:
Wecruit is one of the leading recruitment firms based in Singapore, dedicated to helping job seekers find the right career opportunities.


We partner with reputable companies across a wide range of industries, including Healthcare, IT, Corporate Support, Engineering, Education, Logistics & Supply Chain, Oil & Gas, and Maritime. 


Whether you're looking for permanent roles or short-term assignments, our consultants take the time to understand your experience, preferences, and goals to match you with suitable roles.

With over 1,000 successful placements and a strong track record of candidate satisfaction, Wecruit is here to support your career journey.


Let us help you take the next step—reach out to explore current opportunities or to speak with our team.
